status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: See also registry/entity/sg/gov/csa.json (already existed) for the agency itself.

data.description: Establishes the legal framework for Critical Information Infrastructure (CII) oversight, incident reporting, and licensing of cybersecurity service providers. CSA designates computer systems in 11 essential-service sectors (Energy, Water, Banking & Finance, Healthcare, Transport, Infocomm, Media, Security & Emergency Services, Government) as CII, imposing audit, incident-reporting, and Code of Practice obligations on owners.
data.notes: A Cybersecurity (Amendment) Act took effect October 31, 2025, extending scope (e.g. to cloud/foundational digital infrastructure).
